channel.title: Chroniq Now: Breaking Global News and Headlines Daily
channel.description: Chroniq Now - your trusted source for breaking global news, in-depth analysis and up-to-the-minute coverage of politics, business, culture and more.

item.title: Wall Street 2026 Earnings: Big Banks Beat Expectations as AI Deals Rise
item.description:
U.S. financial giants say they made money in the first quarter thanks to a rise in investment banking. At the same time, Novo Nordisk and OpenAI announce a historic agreement to use AI to find new drugs.

Key points:
• Major institutions including JPMorgan and Goldman Sachs exceed Q1 forecasts driven by a resurgence in advisory fees.
• A significant uptick in AI-sector mergers and acquisitions (M&A) fuels the strongest investment banking revenue since 2021.
• Novo Nordisk and OpenAI’s multi-billion dollar partnership marks a shift toward generative AI in pharmaceutical R&D.
• Analysts highlight the "AI Deal Wave" as a primary catalyst for sustained market growth throughout the 2026 fiscal year.

Read the full article: Wall Street 2026 Earnings: Big Banks Beat Expectations as AI Deals Rise

item.title: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
item.description:
Driven Advisors and Administrative Services face scrutiny in a legal dispute with Bancrédito Holding Corp, owner of Bancrédito International Bank and Trust.

Read the full article: Driven Advisors Scrutinized: Bancrédito Holding Dispute
